data.title: Alaris Equity Partners Income Trust declares Q3 distribution; United States distribution restrictions apply.
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution in the United States. Failure to adhere to this restriction may lead to a violation of United States securities law.

data.title: Nuclear Company hires Hernando A. Madroñero as Head of Nuclear Deployment for construction of 1st fleet of reactors. 100 characters.
data.description: In South Carolina, The Nuclear Company has appointed Hernando A. Madroñero as the Head of Nuclear Deployment, Project Executive. Madroñero, with over 30 years of power generation expertise, will oversee the construction of the company's initial series of nuclear reactors. This nuclear energy leader is at the forefront of deploying gigawatt-scale nuclear power projects in the United States and spearheading advancements in nuclear construction methods.Madroñero's recent role involved design and construction responsibilities, making him a valuable addition to the company's efforts in expanding nuclear power generation.

data.title: Rekt Brands sells 1 millionth can of Rekt Drinks through MoonPay collaboration, hitting a major milestone.
data.description: Rekt Brands recently achieved a significant accomplishment by selling its 1 millionth can of Rekt Drinks sparkling water in collaboration with MoonPay.

data.title: NVIDIA's HGX B200 reduces carbon emissions and boosts efficiency, surpassing the HGX H100. Exciting news for sustainable computing!
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled the HGX B200 platform, boasting a notable reduction in embodied carbon emissions and a substantial improvement in performance and energy efficiency when compared to its forerunner, the HGX H100. This advancement signifies a significant step forward in sustainability efforts by NVIDIA.

data.title: Andrew Peller Limited releases 2025 AGM voting results; shareholders cast their ballots on Sept. 17, 2025.
data.description: In Grimsby, Ontario on September 19, 2025, Andrew Peller Limited (APL) disclosed the outcomes of its 2025 annual general meeting that took place on September 17, 2025. The Company shared the final voting statistics from this meeting.

data.title: FTX Recovery Trust to distribute $1.6 billion to creditors in 3rd round on Sept 30, 2025 per Chapter 11 Plan.
data.description: Today in Wilmington, Delaware, FTX Trading Ltd. (known as FTX.com) and the FTX Recovery Trust jointly revealed their plans for distributing funds in accordance with FTX's Chapter 11 Plan of Reorganization. This distribution will be made to holders of valid claims as outlined in the Plan.

data.title: MākuSafe wins 2025 MSD Solutions Lab Safety Innovation Challenge by National Safety Council, showcasing 10 tech solutions.
data.description: At the NSC Safety Congress & Expo in Denver on September 19, 2025, tech innovators unveiled 10 cutting-edge solutions aimed at addressing musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs), a leading workplace injury. The National Safety Council featured these breakthrough technologies at the fourth annual MSD Solutions Lab. This initiative focuses on curbing workplace injuries through advanced measures, highlighting the importance of preventative strategies. The event brought together industry experts, showcasing innovations designed to reduce MSDs and improve workplace safety standards. The 10 technologies demonstrated at the Expo offer promising avenues to mitigate the risks associated with MSDs, contributing to a safer work environment for employees across various sectors.

data.title: Stock indexes rise as Wall Street awaits news from Trump's call with Xi Jinping, Dow aiming for new highs.
data.description: Key stock indexes saw an increase on Friday as the financial markets anticipated updates following a discussion between President Donald Trump and China's President Xi Jinping. The Dow Jones Industrial Average is aiming for new record levels amidst the talks. Furthermore, a deal involving TikTok and Nvidia is being closely monitored, with Nvidia currently testing an important threshold.

data.title: Frazil, top slush brand in U.S., buys Alligator Ice, a prominent frozen drink company, in convenience store sector.
data.description: In Salt Lake City on September 19, 2025, Frazil, the top slush brand in the U.S., revealed the acquisition of Alligator Ice, a prominent frozen drink company in convenience stores throughout the country. This acquisition signifies a significant step in Frazil's strategic growth initiatives.

data.title: Ethena teams up with Flowdesk, enhancing USDe and USDtb offerings. USDe market cap exceeds $14 billion, ranking it third.
data.description: Ethena has collaborated with Flowdesk to enhance access to USDe and USDtb. The market cap of USDe has exceeded $14 billion, positioning it as the third-largest stablecoin in the market.
CDC PANEL VOTES TO END UNIVERSAL RECOMMENDATION FOR COVID SHOTS

data.title: Robinhood Stock and financials up 18.5% YTD, outperforming broader financial sector, near buy points.
data.description: The group of brokers and investment banks has seen a significant increase of over 18.5% so far this year, outperforming the wider financial sector. The industry, including Robinhood Stock and other financial entities, is approaching buy points as it continues to show strong performance.

data.title: Global Quantum Batteries Market set to grow at 24.5% CAGR to reach $65.4 million by 2030; key drivers include quantum computing, solar energy, EVs, self-driving vehicles, and healthcare.
data.description: The Global Quantum Batteries Market is forecasted to reach $65.4 million by 2030 with a CAGR of 24.5% for 2025-2030. The report covers segments by technology type and application, focusing on North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and Rest of the World, highlighting opportunities in countries like U.S., Canada, China, Japan, Germany, France, and U.K. Quantum batteries are seen as transformative due to high energy density and fast charging capabilities, ideal for quantum computers, EVs, and grid energy storage. Recent advancements improve performance, cycle life, and safety. Factors driving growth include early adoption in quantum computing, solar energy demand, EV sales, self-driving technology, and healthcare. Key aspects include strategies of leading companies, financials, products, patent analysis, and emerging technologies. The market analysis is timely amid increasing competitiveness and practical applications.

data.title: DeepMind AI unlocks century-old fluid secrets, revolutionizing science with implications for vehicle design, weather forecasting, and scientific advancement.
data.description: DeepMind, owned by Google, achieved breakthrough solutions for fluid dynamics equations, with potential implications for accelerating vehicle design, enhancing weather forecasting, and guiding new scientific advancements. These findings could revolutionize industries reliant on fluid dynamics and pave the way for innovative discoveries.

data.title: DeFi lender Morpho briefly raises USDC lending rates for Coinbase users; rates not permanent, says employee.
data.description: An employee at Coinbase has confirmed that the exchange's latest lending product will not provide increased rates permanently.

data.title: Dickey's offers $1 Big Yellow Cups on September 22, 2025 at participating locations nationwide.
data.description: Dickey’s Barbecue Pit is celebrating the onset of fall with a Texan twist by offering a special deal on Monday, September 22, 2025. Customers at participating Dickey’s locations across the country can enjoy $1 Big Yellow Cups all day. The Big Yellow Cup has been a beloved feature of the Dickey’s experience for years, renowned for its large size, vibrant appearance, and unlimited refills of cold beverages. This limited-time offer is a nod to loyal fans of the brand, inviting them to savor the taste of Texas with this refreshing promotion.

data.title: ARC releases detailed Fall 2025 guide for consumers on fall-related services with articles, tips, and infographics.
data.description: The newly released Fall-Related Services Handbook offers a wealth of information including articles, tips, and infographics. On September 19, 2025, American Ratings Corporation (ARC) introduced this comprehensive online guide in PETALUMA, California. The handbook is available on the popular Diamond Certified website and covers a wide range of fall-related services to help consumers make informed decisions.
